data.title: Coast and Fleetio Deepen Partnership to Unite Fuel and Fleet Maintenance Data
data.description: Enhanced features now integrate cost monitoring and upkeep tasks within a unified process based in New York as of July 1, 2026. Coast, which specializes in spend management for field-operating businesses, has partnered with Fleetio, a top fleet maintenance and optimization platform. This collaboration aims to streamline operations and maximize efficiency for companies on the move. The specifics of the collaboration, including key metrics such as cost savings and time efficiency, were not disclosed.

data.title: American Airlines adds new service from Ontario, Calif. to Chicago beginning in December
data.description: In a recent announcement, Ontario International Airport (ONT) officials expressed excitement over American Airlines' decision to launch daily nonstop flights between ONT and Chicago O'Hare International Airport. The airline, a longstanding partner of ONT, has increased its flights by 25% since 2016. This move is set to enhance connectivity between the two major airports and facilitate easier travel options for passengers. The new service is expected to significantly boost air traffic between the two destinations, contributing to the overall growth and accessibility of ONT.

data.title: China EV Sales: BYD's Soar Overseas, Leapmotor Has Best Month Of 2026
data.description: After a challenging beginning of the year, BYD is showing strong signs of recovery as per the latest figures. Similar positive performance is exhibited by other competitors of Tesla such as XPeng and Xiaomi in June. The electric vehicle sales in China reflect BYD's significant growth overseas, while Leapmotor records its best month in 2026.

data.title: Is The Jack In The Box Short Squeeze Back On?
data.description: This week, there was a remarkable increase of over 20% in the stock of Jack in the Box. MarketSurge reports that the stock is currently facing a 40% short interest. The question arises: is the Jack in the Box short squeeze making a comeback? This development was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily.
THE U.S. DECLINED TO RENEW THE USMCA IN ITS CURRENT FORM, TRIGGERING ANNUAL REVIEWS FOR THE NEXT DECADE AND SETTING THE STAGE FOR RENEGOTIATION OF THE $2 TRILLION TRADE PACT WITH CANADA AND MEXICO.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises, Nasdaq Slips As Chip Companies Dive; Meta Soars On This News (Live Coverage)
data.description: Markets show a mixed performance following the release of significant jobs data and Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's remarks. Bloom Energy, Meta, and SpaceX are experiencing notable shifts. The Dow is up, while the Nasdaq is down as chip companies decline. Meta is surging due to recent news, providing live coverage of these market movements.

data.title: PowerBank Closes U.S.$4.2 Million Strategic Investment from New Institutional Investors to Advance U.S. Federal Projects
data.description: On July 1, 2026, in Toronto, PowerBank Corporation (NASDAQ: PBK) (Cboe CA: PBK) (FSE: 103), a prominent player in independent energy development and asset ownership in North America, concluded its registered direct offering. This offering saw significant participation from investors, marking a notable milestone for the company.

data.title: Powerfleet Launches AI-Powered SafeGuard to Help Australian Operators Predict and Prevent Driver Risk With Advanced AI Video Intelligence
data.description: Powerfleet has introduced SafeGuard in Australia, an AI-powered risk intelligence solution that aids safety teams in promptly recognizing and addressing driver risks. SafeGuard utilizes advanced technology to provide real-time insights to enhance safety measures.

data.title: MeridianLink Accelerates Growth and AI Innovation with Appointment of Chief Revenue Officer and Chief Transformation Officer
data.description: In Irvine, California, MeridianLink has recently named John Wiseman as Chief Revenue Officer and Adam Gray as Chief Transformation Officer. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to enhance its leadership team.

data.title: Maple Brings Its Onchain Credit Engine to Robinhood Chain with syrupUSDG
data.description: In San Francisco, Maple, an onchain asset manager, introduced syrupUSDG on Robinhood Chain. This new Syrup asset enables Maple's institutional credit strategies to be applied to Global Dollar (USDG), the regulated stablecoin by Paxos for Global Dollar Network. Maple has facilitated over $22 billion in loans starting from 2022 throughout various market fluctuations. As a component of this launch, Steakhouse Financial, the product's risk curator, sanctioned Maple's syrupUSDG.

data.title: Guild Mortgage Establishes National Partnership With Homes For Our Troops to Help Military Veterans Regain Independence at Home
data.description: In San Diego, Guild Mortgage has revealed a national collaboration with Homes For Our Troops, as the nation gears up to commemorate 250 years of independence. The partnership aims to assist severely injured military veterans in living safer and more independently at home. HFOT constructs and presents specially adapted custom homes to severely injured post-9/11 veterans, with a focus on aiding them in reconstructing their lives. Guild Mortgage and its employee-driven Guild Giving Foundation have pledged to support this cause.

data.title: DOT CONNECTOR SIGNS JENN MACK RAPHOON FOR TEXAS GUBERNATORIAL WRITE-IN CAMPAIGN
data.description: A renowned political consulting and strategic communications firm, Dot Connector, has partnered with an initiative to introduce independent conservative leadership in Texas. The collaboration was confirmed on July 1, 2026, in Austin, Texas. Dot Connector is known nationwide for its expertise in political consultation.

data.title: P3 Media Launches Forward Deployed Engineering Practice to Help Commerce Brands Adopt, Deploy, and Scale AI
data.description: On July 1, 2026, P3 Media, a Shopify Platinum Partner known for expertise in advanced ecommerce solutions, introduced its Forward Deployed Engineering practice. This new service is tailored to assist mid-market businesses with ecommerce, point of sale, and unified commerce enhancements.

data.title: Publix Super Markets Charities Donates $250,000 for Earthquake Relief Efforts in Venezuela
data.description: Publix Super Markets Charities (PSMC) has announced a donation of $250,000 to the Global Empowerment Mission for assisting with relief endeavors in response to the recent earthquakes in Venezuela. The Executive Director of Publix Charities, John Doran, expressed condolences to the affected families, acknowledging the tragic consequences of the natural disasters. Despite the incidents unfolding beyond Publix's operational reach, the organization deemed it necessary to contribute towards ameliorating the situation.

data.title: Bitcoin bear market ends as TD9 reversal signal appears, first since July 2022. Indicator reflects final phase of 2022 price drop.
data.description: Indicators suggest that the Bitcoin bear market may be reaching its bottom, as the TD9 indicator reflects the pattern seen in the final stages of the 2022 BTC price decline.

data.title: 40 scientists on UN's first AI safety panel highlight potential 'catastrophic harm' as AI advances faster than our understanding and regulations.
data.description: A panel of 40 scientists has determined that the capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) are advancing faster than the level of scientific comprehension and regulatory oversight by the government.

data.title: U.S. Customs to Auction 12,000 Tons of Seized Aluminum in Riverside, California
data.description: In Riverside, California, on July 23, 2026, U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) will oversee the final public auction of around 12,000 tons of seized aluminum profiles. This auction will be managed by Amentum and CWS Marketing Group, representing a significant sale of materials.

data.title: Avangrid Convenes Active Innovators and Leading Energy Partners
data.description: A recent event in Boston marked Avangrid's ninth annual Innovation Forum, aimed at speeding up solutions to key challenges in the energy sector. The forum gathered industry experts and innovators to address pressing issues. The event highlighted the importance of collaboration and innovation in tackling growing challenges in the energy industry.
Brent Crude futures settle at $71.57/bbl, down $1.38, 1.89%.

data.title: American Bitcoin, backed by Trump, hits new low price before a 1-for-15 reverse stock split tomorrow.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Bitcoin mining company American Bitcoin experienced a significant drop in its stock price. This decline occurred just a day before the company carried out a reverse stock split of 1-for-15.
